meaning: n.差异,差别,分歧,争论,[数]差额,差分adj.[数]微分的,[机]差动的
examples: Okay, there is a slight difference.
It won't make a scrap of difference.
If you find the same room cheaper elsewhere, the company will pay you the difference.
The difference being that, even if you knew somebody, you couldn't get a room in Shreveport.
